query:
SELECT 
  'Cobertura Forestal' as investigacion,
  id, numero, dominioId, titulo, slug,
  LENGTH(resumenEjecutivo) as len_resumen,
  LENGTH(definicionSistema) as len_definicion,
  LENGTH(tablaMaestra) as len_tabla,
  LENGTH(supuestos) as len_supuestos,
  LENGTH(modelo) as len_modelo,
  LENGTH(escenarios) as len_escenarios,
  LENGTH(brechas) as len_brechas,
  LENGTH(conclusion) as len_conclusion,
  metadataJson IS NULL as metadata_null,
  escenariosConfig IS NULL as escenarios_config_null,
  indicesCalculados IS NULL as indices_null,
  imagenesSatelitales IS NULL as imagenes_null,
  versionProtocolo, fechaCierreSemantico, indiceRobustez,
  publicada, autorId
FROM investigaciones 
WHERE slug = 'cobertura-forestal-historica-choix-2015-2026'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'Finanzas' as investigacion,
  id, numero, dominioId, titulo, slug,
  LENGTH(resumenEjecutivo) as len_resumen,
  LENGTH(definicionSistema) as len_definicion,
  LENGTH(tablaMaestra) as len_tabla,
  LENGTH(supuestos) as len_supuestos,
  LENGTH(modelo) as len_modelo,
  LENGTH(escenarios) as len_escenarios,
  LENGTH(brechas) as len_brechas,
  LENGTH(conclusion) as len_conclusion,
  metadataJson IS NULL as metadata_null,
  escenariosConfig IS NULL as escenarios_config_null,
  indicesCalculados IS NULL as indices_null,
  imagenesSatelitales IS NULL as imagenes_null,
  versionProtocolo, fechaCierreSemantico, indiceRobustez,
  publicada, autorId
FROM investigaciones 
WHERE slug = 'analisis-estructural-presupuesto-municipal-choix-2020-2026';
